wordplay_note: Luba = love; she sings of love while made of circuits
card_description: Luba Luft (meaning "Luft = German for air") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?*. Android opera singer whose artistic passion makes Deckard question retiring her. Name note: Luba = love; she sings of love while made of circuits. Art and beauty as markers of the soul — can a machine create genuine art?. First appears in *Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?*.
first_work: Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?
